refnamediv.refpurpose: Calculate properties of gray-level co-occurrence matrices.

listitem.para: Gray-level co-occurrence matrix returned by imgraycomatrix.
Structure with texture statistics such as contrast, correlation, energy, and homogeneity.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns Contrast, Correlation, Energy, and Homogeneity for each two-dimensional GLCM plane.

refsection.title: Examples
